special.name: Azulejo Cobalt
special.usage: Subtle patterns, specific artistic flourishes (Use sparingly)

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
textures.azulejo_pattern: Use the Azulejo image as a low-opacity (5%) background overlay in specific sections

borders.radius: rounded-sm (Sharp edges preferred for elegance) or rounded-tr-3xl (for organic feel)

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#2F3E46] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-white transition-all duration-500 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: text-[#2F3E46] underline decoration-[#D4AF37] underline-offset-4 hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors

cards.style: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-[#D4AF37]/20 p-8 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/60 transition-all duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden

forms.input: bg-transparent border-b border-[#2F3E46]/20 focus:border-[#D4AF37] outline-none rounded-none px-0 py-4 transition-colors placeholder:text-[#2F3E46]/40 font-light

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install specific dependencies: `framer-motion` (mandatory for scroll reveal), `lucide-react` (icons).
2. THEME: Apply the Google Fonts in `index.css`. Set the background color of the body to #FAF9F6.
3. HEADER: Create a transparent sticky header that blurs (glassmorphism) on scroll. Logo should be text 'THE GOLDEN PANTHER' in Cinzel Decorative.
4. HERO: Use the Gold Texture as a subtle overlay or parallax element. Main focus is Typography + a Floating Botanical Illustration.
5. SECTIONS: Alternate between 'Off-White Cream' and 'Warm Sand' backgrounds. Use generous padding (py-32).
6. PORTFOLIO: Implement a Masonry Layout (Bento Grid). Images must have a grayscale filter that turns to color on hover.
7. FORM: The contact form should feel like a premium invitation. No boxy inputs. Use underlined inputs.
8. AZULEJO: Use the Azulejo texture URL as a border-image or a very subtle background pattern in the 'About' section.
9. FOOTER: Large typography, centered. Social link (@sabadinnk) should be prominent.
10. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: All buttons and links must have a slow, elegant hover transition (duration-500).
11. DATA-TESTID: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Avoid centered layouts for heavy text; use asymmetrical balance.
